notes: Full modern-Vietnamese dinner menu captured. The menu marks 'v' = vegetarian (recorded as VEG; Wokked Lemongrass Tofu is described as vegan -> VEGAN) and '*' = contains raw items (folded into descriptions). Two-price items: oysters (half/dozen), Saigon Dungeness crab (half/whole), steamed rice (small/large). Drinks list not on the page. Vegetable dishes mapped to side; soups/salads/rolls to appetizer/salad.

dishes.name: Shucked Oysters
dishes.description: Raw Shigoku from Samish Bay Washington, mignonette, lemon.

dishes.name: Green Papaya Salad
dishes.description: Grilled wild-caught prawn, mint, caramelized shallot, peanut, nước chấm.

dishes.name: Asian Pear Salad
dishes.description: Organic baby greens, Padano parmesan, almond, tamarind vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Claypot Clams
dishes.description: Hood Canal clams, housemade sausage red sauce, lime aioli, grilled baguette.

dishes.name: Duck Confit Buns
dishes.description: Steamed buns, duck confit, pickled vegetables, herbs.

dishes.name: Pork Spare Ribs
dishes.description: Carlton Farms pork ribs, five-spice dry rub, hoisin barbecue sauce, green onion.

dishes.name: Bò Lá Lốt
dishes.description: Marinated and grilled Painted Hills Farm flank steak wrapped in lá lốt leaves, green onion, peanut.

dishes.name: Tofu Fresh Rolls
dishes.description: Tofu, roasted shiitake mushroom, beansprout, vermicelli noodle, peanut sauce.

dishes.name: Seared Ahi Fresh Rolls
dishes.description: Wild ahi tuna, avocado, crispy shallot, cilantro, ginger nước chấm.

dishes.name: Crispy Vegetarian Rolls
dishes.description: Taro, northwest tofu, carrot, woodear mushroom.

dishes.name: Crispy Imperial Rolls
dishes.description: Carlton Farms pork, shrimp, glass noodle, nước chấm.

dishes.name: Grilled Pork Belly
dishes.description: Grilled marinated pork belly, pickled vegetables.

dishes.name: Steamed Alaskan Black Cod
dishes.description: Lily flower, woodear mushroom, ginger, soy scallop sauce.

dishes.name: Catfish Claypot
dishes.description: Idaho catfish, coconut water, yellow onion caramelized, jalapeño, fish sauce.

dishes.name: Grilled XO Prawn Rice Noodle
dishes.description: Jumbo prawn with house-made XO sauce, rice noodle, bean sprout, green onion.

dishes.name: Prawn Curry
dishes.description: White prawn in housemade curry, with onion, lemongrass, turmeric, coconut milk, peanut, ngò om.

dishes.name: Saigon Dungeness Crab
dishes.description: Live Dungeness crab cooked in the wok with peppercorn, garlic, shallots, and Chinese five spice. Served with garlic noodles. Whole or half available.

dishes.name: Grilled Pork Chop
dishes.description: Lan Roc Farms pork chop, pickled mustard greens, tamarind sauce.

dishes.name: Wokked Cumin Lamb
dishes.description: Anderson Ranch lamb, bell pepper, rice noodle, black bean sauce.

dishes.name: Lúc Lác "Shaking Beef" Tenderloin
dishes.description: Painted Hills Farms beef tenderloin, cognac, onion, watercress and beefsteak tomato salad, salt and pepper lime dip.

dishes.name: Drunken Chicken
dishes.description: Crispy Washington grown drunken chicken, yu choy, sesame.

dishes.name: Lemongrass Chicken Claypot
dishes.description: Braised bone-in chicken claypot, coconut water, lemongrass, garlic, cilantro.

dishes.name: Baby Bok Choy
dishes.description: Woodear mushroom, oyster sauce, garlic.

dishes.name: Asian Eggplant
dishes.description: Green onion, spicy coconut milk, shrimp sauce.

dishes.name: Brussels Sprout
dishes.description: Chinese 5 spice, garlic, soy sauce.

dishes.name: Spicy Green Beans
dishes.description: Spicy green beans, hon shimeji mushroom, pickled radish, dark soy.

dishes.name: Wokked Lemongrass Tofu
dishes.description: Vegan crispy Northwest Tofu, lemongrass, red peppers, assorted mushrooms.

dishes.name: Wokked Soft Noodles
dishes.description: Wheat noodles, king oyster mushroom, oyster sauce, soy, egg, green onion.

dishes.name: Vegetables Fried Rice
dishes.description: Fried brown rice, vegetables, mushrooms, coconut oil.

dishes.name: Seafood Fried Rice
dishes.description: Red rock crab, shrimp, egg, jasmine rice.

dishes.name: Banana Cake
dishes.description: Two slices of our famous banana cake served on a bed of savory coconut sauce.

dishes.name: Coconut Crème Caramel
dishes.description: One piece of house made bánh gan served with a bittersweet caramel sauce.

dishes.name: Champagne Mango
dishes.description: Ripe champagne mango, sweet rice, and our savory coconut sauce.
